events.title: International Women's Day
events.summary: A global day celebrating the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women. The day also marks a call to action for accelerating women's equality.

events.title: Commonwealth Day
events.summary: Celebrated across the 56 member countries, this day features a multicultural service at Westminster Abbey and highlights the shared values and goals of the Commonwealth of Nations.

events.title: Proofreading Day
events.summary: A light-hearted day created to promote error-free writing. It encourages people to take a second look at their emails and documents to avoid embarrassing typos.
